summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of arabesimplement.fr Next.js 15 MVP application. All major features working correctly with minor issues identified.

ui_bugs.issue: Cart items don't persist across page reloads or direct navigation to /panier
Mobile hamburger menu not clearly visible

integration_issues.issue: Clicking formation cards in boutique doesn't navigate to detail pages

issues: Next.js console warnings for missing 'sizes' prop on images

passed_tests: Add to cart functionality with success feedback
Cart display with stepper and totals
Admin dashboard with complete stats and data
Admin formations management with images and actions
Public pages navigation (Cours d'arabe, Témoignages, Contact, Notre Parcours)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix cart persistence issue to maintain items across page reloads. Consider adding formation detail pages if needed. Optional: improve mobile menu visibility and add Next.js image sizes prop.
